description: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Highlights

Vault Inspector 0.4.3 improves wiki-link handling for attachments, adds a shorter CLI command, and cleans up the CLI documentation around common scan flows.

## Fixed

- Fixed short wiki-linked attachments such as `![[image.png]]` being treated as missing when the actual file lives in an attachment folder like `attachments/image.png`.
- Fixed referenced wiki-linked images being reported as orphan attachments when the note used the file name without the attachment folder prefix.
- Kept ambiguous same-name attachment matches conservative in orphan detection so referenced files are not offered for deletion.

## CLI

- Added `vinspect` as a short command alias for `vault-inspector`.
- Kept the full `vault-inspector` command and `vault-inspector scan <vault-path>` subcommand available for existing scripts.
- Updated CLI usage output to show the new short alias.
- Documented that CLI external-link checks use HTTP HEAD requests through runtime `fetch` when Obsidian `requestUrl` is not available.

## Documentation

- Simplified README CLI examples around the primary scan path.
- Updated version references and pinned npm examples to `0.4.3`.

## Verification

- `npm run build && npm test && npm pack --dry-run`
- Release workflow completed successfully and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/compare/0.4.2...0.4.3

releases.author: rogerdigital
releases.description:
## Demo

![Vault Inspector scan results](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/main/docs/images/vault-inspector-errors-orphans.gif)

Vault Inspector scans an Obsidian vault for maintenance issues such as broken links, missing attachments, orphan files, duplicate files, empty notes, and tag usage problems. This demo highlights errors and orphan attachments in one scan.

## What's Changed

* fix: include target path in broken link messages by @rogerdigital in https://github.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/pull/41
* feat: add floating back-to-top button by @rogerdigital in https://github.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/pull/42
* docs: update right panel screenshot by @rogerdigital in https://github.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/pull/43

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rogerdigital/vault-inspector/compare/0.3.1...0.3.2

releases.author: rogerdigital
releases.description:
## New Features

- **Empty Notes scanner** — Flags notes with no meaningful content beyond frontmatter and title heading.
- **External Links scanner** — Checks HTTP/HTTPS URLs in notes for availability (HEAD request).
- **Fix actions** — Batch-delete fixable issues (orphan attachments, empty notes, duplicates) via system trash.
- **Selection mode** — Select multiple issues then batch delete or ignore, replacing per-item action buttons.
- **Separated ignored management** — Collapsible "Ignored items" section at the bottom with independent selection and restore flow.
- **Native tooltips** — Hover descriptions on all interactive buttons using Obsidian's built-in tooltip API.

## Improvements

- Cleaner action bar: icon + count format for Delete/Ignore/Restore buttons.
- Filter toolbar layout improved for even button distribution.
- Toggle-all checkbox matches individual item checkbox style.

## Removed

- **Orphan Notes scanner** — Removed due to excessive noise; empty notes scanner covers the useful case.

## Docs

- README updated to reflect all current scanners, settings, and selection mode workflow.

releases.author: rogerdigital
releases.description:
Initial release of Vault Inspector.

### Scanners
- Broken internal links (wiki links, heading links, aliased links, markdown links, embeds)
- Orphan attachments (images, PDFs, audio, video, archives)
- Duplicate files (name/size candidates + SHA-256 hash verification)
- Frontmatter type inconsistencies
- Tag usage (missing watched tags, low-usage tags)
- Large files (separate Markdown and attachment thresholds)

### Features
- Report dashboard with severity stats
- Filter by scanner and severity
- Click to open file, right-click to copy path
- Ignore issues by stable fingerprint
- Export report as Markdown
- Ribbon icon and command palette integration
